scenario: Create Supplier Account for Internal Supplier
description: Create a new supplier account for an internal supplier with valid credentials and verify that the account is successfully created.

scenario: Attempt Supplier Registration with Inactive Supplier
description: Attempt to create a new supplier account for an inactive supplier and verify that the registration is rejected.

scenario: Update Supplier Information through Self-Service
description: Update supplier information through self-service and verify that the changes are successfully saved.

scenario: Attempt Supplier Self-Service Update with Conflicting Changes
description: Attempt to update supplier information through self-service with conflicting changes and verify that the system rejects the changes.

scenario: Notify Supplier of Update through Email
description: Update supplier information and verify that the supplier is notified through email.

Supplier with invalid certifications and contact information is not registered in Coupa

Supplier master data is accurately and consistently updated across Coupa and SAP

Create Supplier with Internal Flag as True
description: Create a new supplier with internal flag set to true and verify that it is registered successfully.

scenario: Attempt Supplier Registration with Internal Flag as False
description: Attempt to create a new supplier with internal flag set to false and verify that it fails with an error message.

scenario: Verify Supplier Self-Service Updates
description: Create a supplier and update its information through self-service. Verify that the changes are reflected in the system and that there are no conflicts with changes made by the buyer.

scenario: Notify Supplier of Updates and Changes
description: Create a supplier and update its information. Verify that the supplier is notified of the changes through email or other communication channel.

scenario: Verify Data Accuracy and Consistency
description: Create multiple suppliers with different information and verify that the data is accurate and consistent across Coupa and SAP.
